SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:32am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, Clerk-Param Natt, nothing on record. dept.525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Ana Delmis Paroda-Ruiz, was represented by Daniel Navarro-Spanish Interpreter and appeared with Counsel Robert Garcia. Respondent Laudenia Pleitez was represented by her daughter Laudenia Zuniga-Spanish Interpreter. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to question from Judge Myles.

10:17am
EXH(R):- (A) Group 1 (Pgs 1-20)
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
